data.Title: Ice Maker Repair & Drain Clearing
data.Body: Responded to a Sub-Zero ice maker issue causing water leakage and reduced ice production. Our team cleared a blocked drain line and repaired faulty sensors to restore proper function. We also inspected the system for long-term performance and reliability. For expert ice maker and refrigerator repair, contact us at (800) 651-4528.

data.Title: Ice Maker & Drain Line Fix
data.Body: Addressed an ice maker failure and clogged drain line in a Sub-Zero unit. Our team cleared the blockage, repaired the ice maker assembly, and tested all components for proper operation. Preventative maintenance was also completed to reduce future issues. The customer now has a fully functioning ice maker and improved refrigerator performance.

data.Title: Ice Maker Kit & Filter Installation
data.Body:
Just wrapped up a service call in Miami where we installed a new ice maker kit along with a fresh water filter and air filter. The customer wanted to make sure their appliance was running efficiently and producing clean, great-tasting ice.

During the visit, we completed the full installation of the ice maker kit, replaced the existing water filter to improve water quality, and installed a new air filter to help maintain proper airflow. We also performed general maintenance on the unit to ensure everything is operating smoothly and efficiently.

Everything is now running perfectly, and the customer is ready to enjoy clean ice and improved appliance performance. Another successful service call completed in Miami!
